auth.terms: By continuing, you agree to our
auth.brandTagline1: Save places from TikTok, Instagram, anywhere.
auth.brandTagline2: Tell me what you want. I'll find your match.
auth.iosOauthDisabledHint: Google and Apple aren't available in the iOS app yet — use email below.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidCode: That code didn't work. Please try again.
errors.emailCodeUnavailable: Email sign-in isn't available for this account.

suggestions.save: 📍Sushi Sora Bangkok Sukhumvit amazing omakase, I only eat omakase

idle.headline: What are you in the mood for?

consult.placeholder: What are you in the mood for?

offline.headline: You're offline
offline.body: Check your connection and try again.

timeout.headline: That took too long
timeout.body: The request timed out. Try again.

server.headline: Something went wrong
server.body: Our service is having trouble. Try again in a moment.

rate_limit.headline: You've hit your limit
rate_limit.turns_per_session: You've used all {limit_value} messages in this session. Start a new session to continue.
rate_limit.sessions_per_day: You've used all {limit_value} sessions for today. Come back tomorrow.
rate_limit.tool_calls_per_day: You've used all {limit_value} AI actions for today. Come back tomorrow.

tasteProfile.headline: Your taste profile is ready!
tasteProfile.subline: Based on the places you've saved, here's what I know about you.

profile.clearDataConfirm: This permanently deletes your saved places, taste profile, and chat history. This can't be undone.
profile.clearDataError: Couldn't clear your data. Please try again.

places.noSavedDesc: Start saving places you love to build your personal collection
places.noHistoryDesc: Your recommendation history will appear here as you explore

recall.placeholder: That ramen place I saved from TikTok
recall.emptyFooter: Nothing else matches. Want me to find more like this?

save.heading: Save this place
save.error: Couldn't save this place. Try again.

coldStartZero.headline:
Save places you love.
I'll figure out the rest.
coldStartZero.subline: The easiest way to save is from TikTok or Instagram

step1.title: Find a place on TikTok or Instagram
step1.subtitle: Any post, reel, or video mentioning a place

step2.title: Tap Share → Totoro
step2.subtitle: No need to open the app or copy any link

step3.title: I extract and save it automatically
step3.subtitle: Place name, location, and context — done

coldStartZero.pasteHint: or paste a link or type a name below

coldStartOneFour.headline: The more you save, the better I get.
coldStartOneFour.subline: Recall works now. Consult shows what's good nearby.

chipSelection.title: What sounds like you?
chipSelection.subtitle: Tap to confirm what fits. Tap again to reject. Skip if unsure.

illustrations.empty: Totoro looking at an empty space
